why_proceed: cand_espd is the only iteration-4 line with direct full-scale support.
The matched fixed-frontier sham does not reproduce the candidate's combined quality and speed behavior.
The remaining gaps are scope-limiting and fixable, not direction-killing.
scope_limits: The gain is modest, not benchmark-SOTA level.
The current claim supports a bounded speed-line contribution, not a mechanism breakthrough.
The current evidence does not validate the object-level mainline proposal.
required_next_steps: Run one external validation on a second benchmark or a second DLM while keeping shared controls and the fixed-frontier sham.
Produce a reviewer-friendly runtime-lineage artifact covering wall-clock, equal-quality speed, batch, VRAM, extra forwards, and auxiliary overhead.
Run at least one routing/stopping split ablation.
Keep cand_bsr as a low-cost continuation option rather than launching a new full-scale object-line.
